servinfo.title: Passenger Seat Belt Reminder Light Inspection (If Equipped)

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Passenger Seat Belt Reminder Light Removal and Installation (If Equipped)

s1.ptxt: Remove passenger seat belt reminder light.
Connect battery to the passenger seat belt reminder light as shown.
Check that passenger seat belt reminder light (1) lights up.
If passenger seat belt reminder light (1) does not light up, replace the hazard switch.
